_comment: Ground-truth corpus for QuickSay STT regression harness (P0.2). Synthetic placeholders are marked synthetic=true — replace with real clips by running fetch-corpus.ps1. T2.6 owns the full corpus expansion.
_werThresholdNote: 15% WER threshold is a placeholder set after first real baseline measurement. Tighten this once real LibriSpeech clips are in place.

baseline.source: FFmpeg 440Hz sine tone — replace with LibriSpeech test-clean clip
baseline.replacementNote: Run fetch-corpus.ps1 to download real LibriSpeech test-clean WAVs with known transcripts

baseline.source: FFmpeg 550Hz sine tone — replace with LibriSpeech test-clean clip
FFmpeg 660Hz sine tone — replace with LibriSpeech test-clean clip
FFmpeg 770Hz sine tone — replace with LibriSpeech test-clean clip
FFmpeg 500Hz sine tone — replace with LibriSpeech test-clean clip
FFmpeg 580Hz sine tone — replace with LibriSpeech test-clean clip
FFmpeg 660Hz sine tone — replace with LibriSpeech test-clean clip
FFmpeg 740Hz sine tone — replace with LibriSpeech test-clean clip

hallucination.source: FFmpeg-generated 3s silence — replace with sachaarbonel/whisper-hallucinations clip
hallucination.replacementNote: Run fetch-corpus.ps1 to download real whisper-hallucination clips from HuggingFace

hallucination.source: FFmpeg-generated 3s white noise at very low amplitude — replace with whisper-hallucinations clip
FFmpeg-generated 5s silence — replace with whisper-hallucinations clip

edge.description: 2-second 16kHz mono silence — Whisper should return empty or emit a hallucination phrase
2-second 16kHz mono white noise — Whisper should return empty or emit a hallucination phrase
300ms clip — below QuickSay's 500ms minimum. This clip should never reach the STT API in normal app flow. Runner sends it anyway to capture raw Whisper behavior.
edge.appBehavior: QuickSay rejects recordings shorter than 500ms before calling the API
